scripts.dev:admin: concurrently "cd admin/backend && npm run dev" "cd admin/frontend && npm start"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently "cd local/backend && npm run dev" "cd local/frontend && npm start"
scripts.test: npm run test:admin && npm run test:local
scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:local
scripts.start:admin: concurrently "cd admin/backend && npm start" "cd admin/frontend && npm start"
scripts.start:local: concurrently "cd local/backend && npm start" "cd local/frontend && npm start"
